report.summary: Drafted 3 new social posts (#130-131 + updated #125-126) driven by Fear & Greed crash to 8 — historic low, only the 3rd single-digit reading ever (COVID 2020, Terra/Luna 2022, now). Updated newsletter v23 addendum v7 with F&G crash as lead narrative. Created content calendar v34 (5 posts Wed-Sun). Built 2 SVG social cards (F&G crash-to-8 historic comparison dashboard, weekly regulation recap timeline). Key narrative shift: Fear & Greed at 8 while $2.5B ETF inflows + 16-asset commodity classification + tokenization hearing + CLARITY Act 99% done = unprecedented divergence between sentiment and fundamentals.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #128: Congress Tokenization Hearing LIVE — carried from v6, no changes (already in publish window, Wed 12PM ET)

Tweet #130 [NEW]: Fear & Greed Crashes to 8 — HISTORIC LOW. Only 3 single-digit readings ever. COVID 2020 → +156% in 12mo. Terra/Luna 2022 → +260% in 18mo. Historical avg 30-day return from F&G <25: +18%. CTA to fear-greed-timeline (scheduled Wed Mar 25 6PM ET)
Tweet #125 [UPDATED]: BTC $70K + Miner Capitulation — updated F&G from 34 → 8. Miners losing $17K+/coin at $88K production cost. (scheduled Thu Mar 26 10AM ET)

Tweet #126 [UPDATED]: $2.5B ETF Inflows Thread — updated F&G from 34 → 8, added options expiry same-day hook for Friday. Smart money buying while Fear & Greed at 8. (scheduled Fri Mar 27 10AM ET — options expiry day)
Tweet #129: SEC 16 Digital Commodities Thread — carried from v6, no changes (scheduled Sat Mar 29 11AM ET)

Tweet #131 [NEW]: Week in Review — regulation mega-week recap (SEC commodities, CLARITY Act, tokenization hearing, options expiry, ETF inflows) all happening while F&G at 8. CTA to degen0x.com (scheduled Sun Mar 30 12PM ET)

Newsletter v23 addendum v7: F&G crash to 8 as lead narrative + tokenization hearing + institutional flows divergence. New subject line: 'Fear & Greed Hits 8. Congress Debates Tokenization. Wall Street Keeps Buying.'
Discord/Telegram mid-week update v7: F&G CRASH ALERT 8 (from 34), BTC $70,600, SOL $89.84, tokenization hearing today, $13.5B options Thu, historical return data
Content calendar v34: 5 posts Wed-Sun + Discord volatility alert for Thu options expiry

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: BREAKOUT: Fear & Greed crash to 8 — only the 3rd single-digit reading in index history. Previous two (COVID 2020, Terra/Luna 2022) produced +156% and +260% returns respectively. Average 30-day return from F&G <25 is +18% per Glassnode. This is the #1 content hook this cycle.

PEAK: Regulatory clarity mega-week — SEC 16-asset commodity classification + Congress tokenization hearing + CLARITY Act 99% done. Three converging regulatory catalysts unprecedented in crypto history.
DIVERGENCE: Institutional vs retail sentiment at maximum spread. ETFs pulling $2.5B while Fear & Greed at 8. Morgan Stanley MSBT filing. This divergence is the key narrative for all content.
CATALYST: $13.5B options expiry Thursday Mar 27 — max pain ~$70K. Combined with F&G at 8, this creates the highest volatility potential window of Q1 2026.
SUSTAINED: Miner capitulation at $88K production cost vs $70.6K market. Historic pattern: every prior capitulation preceded major recovery.
NEW CONTENT: Bitcoin Safe Haven Guide + BTC Yield Strategies built today. Both timely (Iran crisis + BTCFi growth) and positioned for search traffic.
TIME-SENSITIVE: Tax guides — 21 days to April 15. Entering peak search volume window.
BLOCKED: Git index.lock preventing deploy. 170+ pages behind lock. Manual intervention needed.
